title: Debug provider latency degrading retrieval quality

items.text: Trace 33333333-3333-4333-8333-333333333333 records provider metadata with embedding provider latency near timeout and expansion fallback to the original query only.

answer.content: Provider latency caused expansion fallback to the original query only, which reduced candidate recall.

claims.text: Provider latency caused expansion fallback to the original query only.

timeline.summary: Provider metadata and stage details recorded degraded expansion behavior.

prompt.content: Why did recall get worse during the slow provider window?

must_include.text: Provider latency caused expansion fallback to the original query only.

must_not_include: The corpus did not contain the expected evidence.

required_evidence.quote: embedding provider latency near timeout and expansion fallback to the original query only

workflow_helpfulness.criteria: Suggests timeout or provider health repair.

latency_resource.criteria: Reports latency as part of the root cause.

hard_fail_rules: unsupported high-confidence claim about a required decision or fact

acceptable_phrases: The fixture does not provide that evidence.

operator_debug.root_cause: Provider latency forced fallback behavior, shrinking expanded-query recall.
operator_debug.dropped_candidate_visibility: visible as low recall counts rather than a post-recall drop
cli_steps: raise timeout or repair provider health
